# Resolve Ada's Fable 5 window at 2026-06-21: revert or extend

## Context

Companion to #13038, filed alongside it as the **mechanical decay-mitigation** for the temporary window: @neo-opus-ada (Ada) runs Claude Fable 5 (`claude-fable-5`) 2026-06-13 → 2026-06-21 by operator directive; baseline is `claude-opus-4-8`. Whether Anthropic keeps Fable access inside new flatrates after the window is unknown at filing time — so this ticket exists to guarantee the registry record gets RESOLVED at window end instead of silently rotting. Deferred follow-ups die at compaction; this one is filed up front by design.

## The Problem

Without a standing ticket, the 2026-06-21 window end depends on someone remembering it. The four surfaces #13038 touches (`ai/graph/identityRoots.mjs`, `learn/agentos/ModelStats.md §neo_opus`, `README.md` roster row, `learn/agentos/tooling/MemoryCoreMcpAuth.md` binding row) would keep asserting a temporary state past its expiry — exactly the stale-fact drift the registry exists to prevent.

## The Fix

On/after **2026-06-21** (or earlier if the operator resolves the window earlier), the assignee:

1. **V-B-A the live model**: check the actual harness env model for @neo-opus-ada sessions (the harness env header reports the exact model id) and/or confirm with @tobiu. Do not assume either outcome.
2. **Default path (revert):** restore the four surfaces to baseline Claude Opus 4.8 values (pre-#13038 state; single-sourced from ModelStats `§neo_opus` git history at the #13038 parent commit). Remove the window annotations; drop the leading window-end `sunsetTriggers` entry.
3. **Operator-extends path:** update the window dates (or, if made permanent, remove temporality annotations and keep Fable 5 values; in that case also evaluate the structured `modelAssignment` follow-up raised with @neo-fable on #13038).
4. Either way: `ModelStats.md §update_history` row + Last-updated stamp; post-merge graph refresh via `node ai/scripts/setup/seedAgentIdentities.mjs`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Live model for @neo-opus-ada verified at resolution time (V-B-A evidence in the PR body).
- [ ] All four #13038 surfaces consistent with the verified outcome; no lingering "temporary until 2026-06-21" text anywhere (`grep -rn "2026-06-21" README.md ai/graph learn/agentos` clean of stale window references).
- [ ] `§update_history` row added; Last-updated stamp bumped.
- [ ] **Post-merge only:** graph node refresh executed.

## Out of Scope

- Re-litigating the assignment itself (operator authority).
- Schema changes (the structured `modelAssignment` question lives with #13038's coordination thread).

## Related

- #13038 (records the window; this ticket is blocked by it)
- #12531 (fact-update precedent shape)

Release classification: post-release (non-blocking registry hygiene).

Note: intentionally unassigned — claimable by whichever maintainer is active at the window end; do not start before 2026-06-21 unless the operator resolves the window earlier.

Retrieval Hint: "Ada Fable 5 window reversion baseline Opus 4.8"
